title: ITALY enforcement action against Sole Trader (1,500)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 1,500 on a sole trader. The controller operates a pizzeria and installed video surveillance to protect it. However, the video surveillance captured areas outside the sole trader's property, and data subjects were not informed about the processing. Addit...
